features: Gender: Formulated specifically for women, appealing to those who appreciate feminine scents
Fragrance Notes: A captivating blend of peach, jasmine, and vanilla, with additional notes of mandarin orange and red lily
Form: Luxurious liquid eau de parfum, providing a long-lasting and intense aroma
Packaging: High-quality material, designed for a single application, with a convenient 100-milliliter volume
description: Product Description LONDON MUSK I NEED YOU ROUGE EAU DE PARFUM LONDON MUSK I NEED YOU ROUGE EAU DE PARFUM LONDON MUSK I NEED YOU ROUGE EAU DE PARFUM London Musk I Need You Rouge is a seductive and passionate fragrance that balances vibrant fruitiness and rich floral accords with a luxurious musk base. It feels both modern and timeless, perfect for evening wear or special occasions when you want to leave a memorable impression. “I Need You Rouge” is crafted to evoke the emotional intensity and passionate connections that define unforgettable nights. Inspired by the energy of London’s vibrant nightlife and its mysterious, romantic aura, the fragrance is designed as a sensory story — one of desire, allure, and deep emotional pull. The name itself, “I Need You Rouge,” hints at urgency and fiery affection, with “Rouge” symbolizing red—the color of love, power, and seduction. LONDON MUSK I NEED YOU ROUGE EAU DE PARFUM Mood & Occasions Mood: Passionate, confident, seductive, and irresistibly feminine with a modern edge. Occasions: Perfect for romantic evenings, date nights, special celebrations, or whenever you want to feel empowered and alluring. Season: Best suited for fall and winter due to its warmth and depth but can be worn year-round if you love rich, bold scents. LONDON MUSK I NEED YOU ROUGE EAU DE PARFUM Why You’ll Love It From the first spray, London Musk I Need You Rouge enchants with juicy red berries and spicy pink pepper, opening lively and seductive. The heart’s rose and jasmine create a lush floral bouquet, while the warm musk base leaves an intimate, cozy trail. Perfectly balanced—fruity yet not sweet, floral yet not powdery, musky yet light—it’s long-lasting, elegant, versatile, and boosts confidence, making it ideal for any occasion. LONDON MUSK I NEED YOU ROUGE EAU DE PARFUM NOTES TOP NOTES Red Berries (Raspberry, Cranberry, or similar): These juicy, tangy fruits provide an initial burst of freshness and playful sweetness that instantly lifts the mood. Cherries: A rich, dark fruity note adding depth and a slightly tart edge to the opening. Pink Pepper: Adds a sparkling, slightly sharp spice that keeps the top lively and vibrant, preventing it from being overly sweet. HEART NOTES Damask Rose: Known as the “queen of flowers,” Damask rose adds a rich, velvety floral heart that is deeply romantic and sensual, yet refined. Jasmine Sambac: Adds a creamy, exotic floral nuance with a slightly indolic (heady) touch that elevates the scent’s sophistication. Violet: Offers a soft, powdery floral lift with a hint of sweet earthiness, rounding out the heart with elegant complexity. BASE NOTES Musk: The star of the base, musk adds warmth, sensuality, and a skin-like softness that makes the fragrance intimate and addictive. Sandalwood: Creamy, smooth, and woody, sandalwood supports the musk with a gentle, comforting embrace. Amber: Adds a resinous, golden warmth that enhances the fragrance’s richness and longevity. Vanilla (Subtle): A whisper of vanilla rounds out the base, adding sweetness without being gourmand — enhancing softness and approachability. LONDON MUSK LAXURIOUS ARABIAN MUSK & OUD PERFUMES Where fragrance meets elegance. Born in the heart of London, our brand is dedicated to crafting luxurious scents that embody sophistication and timelessness. We blend rich Middle Eastern and European traditions, merging deep oud, amber, and musk with delicate florals and vibrant citrus. The result is a signature collection of fragrances that are both captivating and unforgettable. Quality is our foundation. We source the finest ingredients globally, ensuring each bottle is crafted with precision and care by our expert perfumers. Every scent is a harmonious balance that evolves beautifully on the skin. At London Musk , luxury is more than a product—it's an experience. From our elegant packaging to the lasting impression of our fragrances, every detail is designed to indulge the senses with sophistication
